name: trust-ops-renamed-to-trust-state
hook: trust-ops.ts was refactored into trust-state.ts in a later commit
body: The CTO trust architecture was refactored from a staff-keyed to a duty-keyed model. The file `trust-ops.ts` was merged into `trust-state.ts`. When merging PRs based on older commits, check if import targets still exist in the current codebase.
why: PR #31 was based on ce8fca0 which introduced trust-ops.ts, but origin/main later consolidated everything into trust-state.ts. The test file's imports from trust-ops would have caused runtime failures.
